Reference to a registered model class

Source: R/type_spec.R
t_model.Rd

Matches a typed model instance whose S3 class is class_name. The class need not exist when the spec is constructed — the registry is consulted at validation time, which makes forward references possible.

Usage

t_model(class_name)

Arguments

class_name

Character scalar — the registered model class name.

Value

A type_spec of kind "model_ref".

See also

Other type specifications: is_type_spec(), t_enum(), t_list_of(), t_nullable(), t_predicate(), t_union(), t_vector_of(), type_spec

Examples

define_model("Address", fields = list(zip = field("character")))
addr_spec <- t_model("Address")
is_type(new_Address(zip = "10115"), addr_spec)
#> [1] TRUE
